+        _courses = BuildCourses();
+    }

+    public IReadOnlyList<Department> GetDepartments() => _departments;
+
+    public Department? GetDepartment(string id) =>
+        _departments.Find(d => d.Id.Equals(id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetFeaturedCourses() =>
+        _courses.Where(c => c.IsFeatured).ToList();
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> SearchCourses(string? search, string? departmentId, string? level)
+    {
+        var query = _courses.AsEnumerable();
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(departmentId))
+            query = query.Where(c => c.DepartmentId.Equals(departmentId, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(level))
+            query = query.Where(c => c.Level.Equals(level, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search))
+        {
+            var term = search.Trim();
+            query = query.Where(c =>
+                c.Title.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Code.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Description.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Instructor.Name.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+        }
+
+        return query.OrderBy(c => c.Code).ToList();
+    }

+using UniversityCourseCatalog.Models;

+public class CatalogService
+{
+    private readonly List<Department> _departments;
+    private readonly List<Course> _courses;
+
+    public CatalogService()
+    {
+        _departments = BuildDepartments();
+        _courses = BuildCourses();
+    }
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Department> GetDepartments() => _departments;
+
+    public Department? GetDepartment(string id) =>
+        _departments.Find(d => d.Id.Equals(id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetFeaturedCourses() =>
+        _courses.Where(c => c.IsFeatured).ToList();
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> SearchCourses(string? search, string? departmentId, string? level)
+    {
+        var query = _courses.AsEnumerable();
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(departmentId))
+            query = query.Where(c => c.DepartmentId.Equals(departmentId, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(level))
+            query = query.Where(c => c.Level.Equals(level, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(search))
+        {
+            var term = search.Trim();
+            query = query.Where(c =>
+                c.Title.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Code.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Description.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Instructor.Name.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+        }
+
+        return query.OrderBy(c => c.Code).ToList();
+    }

data.content:
The Blazor Web App is ready. Here's what was built:

**Project:** `UniversityCourseCatalog` (.NET 10, Static SSR — no JS interactivity needed)

**Pages:**
- **`/`** — Homepage with 6 department cards and featured course highlights
- **`/courses`** — Searchable, filterable course list (keyword, department, level) with results table
- **`/courses/{id}`** — Course detail with description, schedule, credits, enrollment status, instructor bio, and breadcrumb navigation
- **`/enroll`** — Enrollment request form (name, student ID, email, course dropdown, notes) with server-side validation

**Architecture:**
- `CatalogService` — singleton with 14 sample courses across 6 departments
- `EnrollmentService` — stores submitted requests in memory
- Standard Bootstrap 5 styling, no authentication

Run with: `cd UniversityCourseCatalog && dotnet run`
